title: Missing official nodes after fresh Docker installation
symptom: After setting up a fresh n8n instance, official nodes like 'Text Classifier' are not appearing in the interface.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker environment
not_this_if: Nodes are missing in a non-Docker installation
Using an older version of n8n
root_cause: The issue arises when the local Docker image is outdated. If the latest image has not been pulled from the Docker registry, the instance may not have access to the most recent features and nodes.
fix_steps: Run the command `docker pull n8nio/n8n:latest` to fetch the latest image
Restart the Docker Compose setup using `docker-compose down` and then `docker-compose up -d`
agent_instruction: Pull the latest n8n Docker image and restart the Docker Compose setup.
